name: Shaun Verner
background: Shaun Verner is a mining executive with over 30 years of experience in the resources industry. Prior to joining Syrah, he held senior roles at BHP, including in marketing, sales, and strategy. He has extensive experience in international markets and commodity trading.

company_affiliations.name: Syrah Resources Limited
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

company_affiliations.name: BHP Group Limited
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Vice President, Marketing (Coal and Base Metals)
